Class baseStone

java.lang.Object
logic.base.BaseItem
logic.stone.baseStone
All Implemented Interfaces:
Mineable
Direct Known Subclasses:
HardStone, Iron, Mithril, NormalStone, Platinum, Vibranium
public abstract class baseStone extends BaseItem implements Mineable
Abstract base class for all mineable ore and stone nodes in the game world. Each node has a fixed durability that is reduced each time it is mined. When durability reaches zero the node is broken and drops items to the player.

  • Constructor Details

    • baseStone

      protected baseStone(String name, int maxDurability, int dropAmount)
      Creates a new stone node with the given name, durability, and drop amount.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of this ore type
      maxDurability - the number of mining hits required to break this node
      dropAmount - the number of item drops produced when the node breaks

  • Method Details

    • mine

      public List<BaseItem> mine(int minePower, Player player)
      Description copied from interface: Mineable
      Mines this node with the given power level and grants items to the player.
      Specified by:
      mine in interface Mineable
      Parameters:
      minePower - the mining power of the player's pickaxe
      player - the player performing the mining action
      Returns:
      the list of items obtained from mining

    • dropItems

      protected List<BaseItem> dropItems()
      Generates the list of items dropped when this node is fully mined.
      Returns:
      a list containing dropAmount items created by createItem()

    • createItem

      protected abstract BaseItem createItem()
      Factory method that creates one instance of the ore item dropped by this node.
      Returns:
      a new BaseItem representing the ore

    • isBroken

      public boolean isBroken()
      Description copied from interface: Mineable
      Returns whether this node is fully depleted and can no longer be mined.
      Specified by:
      isBroken in interface Mineable
      Returns:
      true if broken, false otherwise
